title: Refresh and Reload
drDigitalIntro: Sometimes a website loads partially or gets stuck — clicking the Reload button (the circular arrow) loads the page again. You can also press Ctrl+R. If a page looks broken or old, a reload usually fixes it by fetching a fresh copy. It's the first thing to try when a page acts up.

playgroundTask.goal: Reload a page that got stuck

steps.say: Go to shop.example — type it and press Enter.
Imagine the page got stuck. Click the ⟳ Reload button (or press Ctrl+R) to load it fresh.

drDigitalSuccess: You reloaded the page. When a site looks broken or won't finish loading, the ⟳ reload button is the first thing to try.
drDigitalHint: The ⟳ circular-arrow Reload button is in the toolbar, just left of the address bar.
